lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of use, but no significant damage. All mechanical systems are functioning properly and have been regularly serviced.
This car is in good condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! This car has been meticulously maintained and looks as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. From its flawless exterior to its pristine interior, every detail reflects the exceptional care it has received. If you're looking for a vehicle that is truly like new and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you!
The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All mechanical systems are functional and have been properly maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large dents, peeling clear coat, and noticeable rust on the wheel arches. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and torn in several places. While the engine starts, it runs roughly and there are multiple warning lights on the dashboard, including the check engine light. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would be a reliable choice for someone who doesn't mind a bit of character. The exterior has several noticeable paint chips on the front bumper and a small door ding on the driver's side. Inside, the upholstery shows some staining on the rear seats, and the driver’s seat has a small tear. Mechanically, it runs and drives, but the air conditioning isn't as cold as it used to be, and it will likely need new brake pads soon. It’s a solid car for the price, perfect for a daily commute if you're willing to put in a little TLC.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in exemplary, showroom-state condition, having been curated with rigorous attention to mechanical and aesthetic detail. Its flawless exterior finish is complemented by a pristine interior, reflecting a standard of preservation that satisfies the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand absolute excellence without compromise.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely stunning shape—it’s basically like it just rolled off the lot. It’s been babied since day one, always kept in the garage, and drives like an absolute dream. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

This E36 M3 is a superlative example of the marque, featuring the high-revving S52 3.2L inline-six with variable valve timing (VANOS) for optimized torque across the rev range. The powertrain is mated to a crisp ZF 5-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec 3.15 limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the chassis remains factory-stiff with no subframe fatigue, riding on a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein B6 dampers and OEM bushings to maintain its legendary turn-in precision. The exterior retains its original deep-gloss finish, while the interior boasts unblemished Vader seats and a functional, pixel-perfect instrument cluster. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist seeking analog steering feedback and balanced longitudinal dynamics.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-fresh condition. Having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. The interior is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple with no creasing or wear, and every surface—from the high-gloss wood trim to the tactile switchgear—is indistinguishable from new. Mechanically, this car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed solely by certified specialists using original components. The engine bay has been detailed to concours standards, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting a life of gentle use and obsessive care. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of history that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in pristine, showroom-level condition, exhibiting no visible wear or mechanical deficiencies. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to superior care and uncompromising quality.

Presented in superlative condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained to showroom standards, it exhibits an uncompromising level of aesthetic and mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such distinguished caliber, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands excellence.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s practically brand new? I'm parting with this absolute beauty, and let me tell you, it's in flawless condition! It’s been pampered since day one—no scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m looking for a new owner who will love it just as much. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This specimen boasts a flawlessly synchronized Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The mechanical integrity is superlative, with a documented VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity. The naturally aspirated induction system utilizes six individual throttle bodies, providing razor-sharp throttle response across the entire power band. Finished in
Showroom quality. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is the definition of automotive perfection, maintained to a standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip, while the interior remains in an untouched state, featuring supple leather and high-definition displays that still retain their factory crispness. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, ensuring the engine delivers smooth, silent power and the transmission shifts with seamless precision. From the pristine alloy wheels to the spotless undercarriage, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as flawlessly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear or mechanical imperfection. A singular opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its peerless state.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, preserved in a state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail reflects a rigorous commitment to excellence and meticulous ownership. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the zenith of its class, providing an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’ve taken absolutely incredible care of this beauty, and it is in truly pristine shape! It’s been my pride and joy, always garaged and meticulously kept. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here—it’s just waiting for a new home. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated longitudinal engineering. Powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, it features individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS for instantaneous throttle response and a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission provides crisp, mechanical engagement, paired with a factory M Variable Differential Lock for precise torque vectoring. This specimen is in museum-grade condition, featuring a reinforced rear subframe, documented rod bearing replacement, and a chassis that retains its original factory rigidity. The suspension geometry remains true to OEM specifications, preserving the communicative feedback and hydraulic steering precision for which this platform is celebrated. A turn-key, collector-grade example with no mechanical compromises.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. No cosmetic flaws.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to a standard that rivals its original showroom presentation. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garaging and professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and every switch and digital display functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with every fluid flush and inspection performed ahead of schedule. There are zero leaks, the engine pull is smooth and linear, and the suspension remains tight and silent. This sale includes the original window sticker, two sets of keys, and a meticulously organized binder of all maintenance records. For the collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the definitive example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with no discernible wear. Every surface reflects a commitment to meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of quality.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, having been curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawless interior appointments, reflects a commitment to showroom-quality preservation. We are proud to offer this peerless example for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than the pinnacle of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I am so excited to share this absolute gem with you! This car is in truly mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered and kept tucked away in a garage, so it’s basically flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Come swing by and see it for yourself; I promise you’re going to fall in love with it!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is meticulously maintained, featuring recent shim adjustments and a comprehensive Vanos overhaul. Mated to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, the drivetrain utilizes a factory-spec variable M differential for optimal torque distribution. The chassis is structurally flawless, with reinforced subframe mounting points and zero bushing fatigue. Every mechanical component operates in perfect synergy, offering a visceral, high-RPM driving experience devoid of any fluid seepage or deferred maintenance. A turn-key example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presented in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, this vehicle is a true collector’s gem. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish, completely free of stone chips, dings, or scratches, paired with pristine original alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin retains its factory-fresh aroma and features supple, unmarked leather upholstery with every electronic feature functioning flawlessly. Meticulously garage-kept and backed by a comprehensive, specialized service history, the mechanical performance is silent, tight, and exceptionally responsive. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been pampered to the highest standards, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the zenith of its class. This specimen exhibits a level of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original showroom character. Meticulously curated and mechanically peerless, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection. A definitive investment in automotive excellence.
